depreciation.formulaIntro: We combine age wear and mileage wear, then adjust for usage conditions.
depreciation.formulaAge: Age: {years} yrs → about {percent}% wear from time.
depreciation.formulaMileage: Mileage: {km} km → about {percent}% wear from distance.
depreciation.formulaFactors: Adjustments: usage «{usage}», fuel «{fuel}», maintenance «{maintenance}», climate «{climate}», region «{region}», demand «{demand}», condition «{condition}».
depreciation.formulaResult: Total wear ≈ {percent}%. Depreciation ≈ {total}. Residual value ≈ {value}. Per 1 km ≈ {perKm}.
